---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
# neural_kegg_pathview_all.R
# Run AFTER your main enrichment pipeline (expects output/enrichment_objects.rds).
# Generates Pathview diagrams for ALL neural-related KEGG pathways (ORA + GSEA).

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(pathview)
  library(KEGGREST)
  library(openxlsx)
})

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load saved objects from the main script
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
rds_file <- file.path("output", "enrichment_objects.rds")
if (!file.exists(rds_file)) stop("Missing ", rds_file, " — run the main script first.")
objs <- readRDS(rds_file)

# Expect: ekegg, gsea_kegg, fc_vec (from main script)
ekegg_df      <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(objs$ekegg),     error = function(e) tibble::tibble())
gsea_kegg_df  <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(objs$gsea_kegg), error = function(e) tibble::tibble())
fc_vec        <- objs$fc_vec
if (is.null(fc_vec) || is.null(names(fc_vec))) stop("Missing or unnamed fc_vec in RDS.")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Output directories
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
outdir <- "output"
pv_dir <- file.path(outdir, "pathview_neural_all")
dir.create(pv_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Neural pattern (matches your main script's extended list)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
neural_kw <- unique(c(
  "neuro","neuron","neura","neural","synap","axon","dendrit","neur","brain","nerv",
  "glia","myelin","schwann","spine","plasticity","cerebral","cerebell","cortex",
  "spinal","ganglia","astrocyte","oligodendro","hippocamp","amygdala","neurite",
  "neuritogen","growth cone","axon elongat","axon outgrowth","axon extension",
  "dendrite outgrowth","dendrite extension","neuron projection","neuronal projection",
  "growth-cone cytoskeleton","filopodia","lamellipod","microtubule polymeriz",
  "actin cytoskelet","neurotransm","neuropept","neuromodul","autonom",
  "sympathetic","parasympathetic","neuromuscular","neurogenesis","axonogen",
  "myelination","microglia"
))
neural_class_kw <- c("Nervous system","Neurodegenerative","Sensory system")
neural_pattern <- paste(c(neural_kw, neural_class_kw), collapse = "|")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Determine KEGG organism code (e.g., "gga") from IDs, fallback to "gga"
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
extract_prefix <- function(id) {
  m <- regmatches(id, regexpr("^[A-Za-z]{3}", id))
  if (length(m) == 1 && nchar(m) == 3) m else NA_character_
}
prefixes <- c(
  na.omit(sapply(ekegg_df$ID %||% character(0), extract_prefix)),
  na.omit(sapply(gsea_kegg_df$ID %||% character(0), extract_prefix))
)
kegg_code <- if (length(prefixes)) names(sort(table(prefixes), decreasing = TRUE))[1] else "gga"
message("Using KEGG organism code: ", kegg_code)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Collect neural pathway IDs from KEGG ORA and KEGG GSEA
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# From KEGG ORA: search Description + Class (if present)
neural_ora <- tibble::tibble(ID = character(0), Description = character(0))
if (nrow(ekegg_df)) {
  search_ora <- paste0(ekegg_df$Description %||% "",
                       " ",
                       if ("Class" %in% names(ekegg_df)) tidyr::replace_na(ekegg_df$Class, "") else "")
  ora_rows <- grepl(neural_pattern, search_ora, ignore.case = TRUE)
  if (any(ora_rows)) neural_ora <- ekegg_df[ora_rows, c("ID","Description"), drop = FALSE]
}

# From KEGG GSEA: search Description
neural_gsea <- tibble::tibble(ID = character(0), Description = character(0))
if (nrow(gsea_kegg_df) && all(c("ID","Description") %in% names(gsea_kegg_df))) {
  gsea_rows <- grepl(neural_pattern, gsea_kegg_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  if (any(gsea_rows)) neural_gsea <- gsea_kegg_df[gsea_rows, c("ID","Description"), drop = FALSE]
}

# Union with source labels for the guide
neural_union <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dplyr::mutate(neural_ora,  Source = "KEGG ORA"),
  dplyr::mutate(neural_gsea, Source = "KEGG GSEA")
) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Description = dplyr::first(na.omit(Description)),
    Source      = paste(unique(na.omit(Source)), collapse = " + "),
    .groups     = "drop"
  )

if (nrow(neural_union) == 0) {
  message("No neural-related KEGG pathways found in ORA/GSEA — nothing to render.")
  quit(save = "no")
}

message("Neural KEGG pathways found: ", nrow(neural_union))

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Render Pathview for each neural pathway
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
guide <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(neural_union))) {
  pid  <- neural_union$ID[i]         # e.g., "gga04724"
  desc <- neural_union$Description[i]
  src  <- neural_union$Source[i]

  # Pathview expects numeric pathway ID; strip the organism prefix
  clean <- sub(paste0("^", kegg_code), "", pid)
  if (identical(clean, pid)) clean <- sub("^\\D+", "", pid)  # fallback: drop all non-digits at start

  message(sprintf("Pathview (neural): %s  (%s; %s)", pid, desc, src))

  old_wd <- getwd(); setwd(pv_dir)
  tryCatch({
    pathview(
      gene.data   = fc_vec,
      pathway.id  = clean,
      species     = kegg_code,
      out.suffix  = "logFC_neural_all",
      kegg.native = TRUE
    )
    base <- paste0(pid, ".logFC_neural_all")
    guide[[length(guide) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      Pathway_ID  = pid,
      Description = desc,
      Source      = src,
      PNG_File    = file.path("pathview_neural_all", paste0(base, ".png")),
      PDF_File    = file.path("pathview_neural_all", paste0(base, ".pdf")),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("  ⚠ Pathview error for ", pid, ": ", e$message)
  })
  setwd(old_wd)
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Write guide table
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (length(guide)) {
  guide_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(guide)
  write.csv(guide_df, file = file.path(outdir, "kegg_pathview_neural_all_guide.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  openxlsx::write.xlsx(guide_df,
                       file = file.path(outdir, "kegg_pathview_neural_all_guide.xlsx"),
                       overwrite = TRUE)
  message("✓ Guide written: ",
          file.path(outdir, "kegg_pathview_neural_all_guide.csv"), " and .xlsx")
} else {
  message("No pathview images were generated (errors or zero matches).")
}

message("✓ Done. Files in: ", pv_dir)
```
